title: ヒシアマ姐さんの弱点？

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, those clouds are looking kind of rough. I'd
better book it home before the rain starts comin'
down.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Damn it, I'm no good with thunder! I keep
freezing up when I hear it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I'm so pathetic. Please don't strike anywhere
near here! Pleeease!
